channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Battle royale typing game Final Sentence now available
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Your survival hinges on flawless keystrokes.

Battle royale typing game Final Sentence is now available for PC via Steam, Polden Publishing and developer Button Mash announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Final Sentence is a battle royale typing game. Together with other players, you find yourself in a hangar, with a typewriter in front of you and a revolver loaded with a single bullet at your temple. Every mistake can be fatal. Only one will remain.

Key Features

  • Battle Royale on Typewriters – You’ve never played anything like this before. Type fast and type accurately—your life depends on it. There’s a revolver pointed at your head… with one bullet in the chamber.
  • Beat Your Friends – Play with strangers in massive rooms of 40 to 100 players—or battle it out in private matches with four or eight friends.
  • Deep Stats and Ranked System – Every achievement is tracked and compared with others. See your progress. Know exactly where you’re improving—and where you’re falling behind.

Watch a new trailer below.

Launch Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/battle-royale-typing-game-final-sentence-now-available
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Neverway launches in October; ‘Prologue’ demo now available for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Switch

Become the immortal herald of a dead god.

Neverway, the horror, life simulation, and action RPG hybrid co-created by the pixel artist behind Celeste, will launch for Switch and PC via Steam in October, with “more consoles to be announced,” developer Coldblood Inc. announced. A free “Prologue” demo is available now for PC.

Here is an overview of the game, via Coldblood Inc.:

About

After quitting her dead-end job, Fiona starts over on a farm and becomes the immortal herald of a dead god. Make friends, fight through horrors and pay your debt in this nightmarish life simulation RPG.

Play the prologue now on Steam!

Key Features

  • Co-directed by Pedro Medeiros, pixel artist from Celeste and Towerfall.
  • Featuring an original soundtrack by Disasterpeace, from Hyper Light Drifter, FEZ, and It Follows.
  • Crunchy sounds by Martin Kvale (NokNok Audio), from Tiny Glade and Dome Keeper.
  • Made with Murder Engine, an open source engine by ex-Microsoft Isadora Sophia.
  • Blends life sim and action RPG on a slow-burning psychological horror.
  • Story rich and narrative driven with interactive cutscenes inspired by Mother 3.
  • Fast-paced combat inspired by The Legend of Zelda: A Link to the Past.
  • Meet or date 10+ characters with unique routines and storylines.
  • Customize your playstyle with crafted items and combat abilities.
  • Unlock combat abilities through friendship bonds.
  • Farm, fish, craft, and build a new life on a remote island.
  • Time progresses in three slots that you choose when to advance: morning, afternoon, and evening.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Release Window Trailer

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/neverway-launches-in-october-prologue-demo-now-available-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Risk of Rain 2 DLC ‘Hallowed Concepts’ announced
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS4
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Xbox One
  • Xbox Series

Go deeper into the dark, cult-like world of N'Kuhana.

Gearbox Publishing and developer Gearbox Software have announced Risk of Rain 2 downloadable content “Hallowed Concepts.” A release date was not announced.

Here is an overview of the content, via Gearbox Publishing:

In this expansion, the lessons of darkness and death, once contained to rumor and hearsay, are getting louder and harder to ignore. Hallowed Concepts takes players deeper into the cult-like world of N’Kuhana. Survivors will fight through haunting new regions of Petrichor V, face horrific new enemies, and uncover powers never before possible in Risk of Rain 2.

“Hallowed Concepts” offers powerful curses to overcome, deadly trials to face, and new stages to explore, including the fetid depths of the returning Damp Caverns, the villages of the Tenebrous Quagmire, and the sacred ground of The Lurid Basilica. Players can explore this new content as two new playable Survivors coming as part of Hallowed Concepts.

Risk of Rain 2 is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Switch, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store.

Watch the downloadable content announcement trailer below.

DLC “Hallowed Concepts” Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/risk-of-rain-2-dlc-hallowed-concepts-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
